posts.author: MaxLogic_Lisa (Lisa Armstrong)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi

I have a board that has connect fields. One of the mirror column links to a mirror column. Why is it not showing the data when I click on it.

Example.

When I click on the above number it should show details of the PO (like it does in the originating board) but it doesn’t it just shows the number:

I would expect it to show as it does on the originating board which is:

image481×515 15.3 KB

Thank you
Lisa

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @MaxLogic_Lisa

You can’t mirror a mirror column, it is not supported.

posts.author: MaxLogic_Lisa (Lisa Armstrong)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you for the quick response.

I do not get the error message that you get.
Monday lets me pick the column to be mirrored.

Is what I am doing different?

Thanks
Lisa

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml: Don’t know what you are doing different, but mirroring a mirror column is just not supported. You can have two board showing a mirror to the same column on a third board however.

posts.author: rodneyz (Rodney)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @MaxLogic_Lisa , how are you? I understand you are trying to achieve that certain process flow using mirror column. Have you tried using the same item live on different boards instead? There is a newly launched app called Same Item Multiple Boards by Formula Lookout, let me know how it goes

posts.author: sa07chin (Sachin Singh)
posts.cookedHtml: A possible solution for mirroring columns can be using Lookup Sync app (available on monday.com Marketplace), which can handle syncing data between different columns on various boards. It also allows for multi-column mapping and keeps everything updated automatically. This might help streamline your process if mirroring isn’t working as expected.
